title: selaginella zahnii
intro: Selaginella zahnii, also known as Zahn's spike moss, is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae, belonging to the genus Selaginella. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, Selaginella zahnii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its potential therapeutic benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
